creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here's a list of ports from my box that (after updating gettext and all ports that have had their PORTREVISIONS bumped) still have files that are linked with libintl.so.8, but are not linked with [anything other linked with libintl.so.8]. Thus these are likely ports that use gettext directly and thus need USE_GETTEXT and revision bump.

ImageMagick-6.6.1.10
abiword-2.8.4
clutter-1.2.8
clutter-gtk-0.10.4
fluidsynth-1.1.1
goocanvas-0.15_3
gtkglext-1.2.0_7
gtkglextmm-1.2.0_5
libchamplain-0.4.5
libgksu-1.3.8_3
libopenraw-0.0.8_3
libsexy-0.1.11_4
libxml++-2.30.0
loudmouth-1.4.3_2
ogre3d-1.6.5_2
py26-clutter-1.0.2
py26-cluttergtk-0.10.0
py26-gnome-2.28.1
rrdtool-1.4.3
vips-7.14.5_2
wv-1.2.7_1
